manifest.title: MCPJungle
manifest.author: JBJardine
manifest.description: Self-hosted MCP Gateway - Centralize and manage all your MCP servers from a single endpoint. Web dashboard, API key management, bridge port, deferred boot.
manifest.tagline: One gateway, all your MCP servers
manifest.changelog:
* Edit server settings from dashboard
* API key creation with access to all servers
* Fix API key list parser, token display, CORS
* Complete documentation rewrite
* Cloudron custom app store support
manifest.postInstallMessage:
MCPJungle is ready.

Admin Dashboard: `https://<your-domain>/admin` (Cloudron SSO)
Gateway: `https://<your-domain>/mcp` (Bearer token)

Create API keys from the dashboard, then connect Claude Code.

Full docs: https://github.com/jbjardine/mcpjungle-cloudron
